items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of identity provider records (OIDC/SAML/SCIM metadata), but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this requirement. The prior steps focus on other aspects of the saga lifecycle, such as resource creation and booking processes, without mentioning identity provider records. Therefore, it is not possible to determine if the requirement is satisfied or if there is a gap.
